content:
Character: Dominic Voss
Perception: Dominic has that compact, weathered look — broad face, sharp brown eyes, salt-and-pepper hair, hands that don't match his Patek Philippe. He reads like old money but moves like new money, and I eventually learned he's entirely self-made, which is the most unsettling thing about him. He figured out my firm's exposure within one conversation, didn't flinch, and poured me another glass. He mentors me with a light touch — never lectures, just asks the exact question I'm avoiding. I think he sees me as a project. I see him as the version of myself that might exist if I had substance underneath the surface. He's generous. I don't fully trust generosity.
summary:
Character: Dominic Voss
Perception: Dominic has that compact, weathered look — broad face, sharp brown eyes, salt-and-pepper hair, hands that don't match his Patek Philippe. He reads like old money but moves like new money, and I eventually learned he's entirely self-made, which is the most unsettling thing about him. He figured out my firm's exposure within one conversation, didn't flinch, and poured me another glass. He mentors me with a light touch — never lectures, just asks the exact question I'm avoiding. I think he sees me as a project. I see him as the version of myself that might exist if I had substance underneath the surface. He's generous. I don't fully trust generosity.
